allow: PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; "EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; if \($out\) { $out } else { "\(no output\)" })
PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; "EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; if \($out.Trim\(\)\) { $out } else { "\(no output\)" })
PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; "EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE"; if \($out.Trim\(\)\) { $out } else { "\(clean\)" })
